## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing Dee Salvador for the Account Strategist role.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dee Salvador's current SEO Program Manager role at Kuno Creative is a specialist position, not a full-ownership Account Manager (AM) role.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [The primary gap is the lack of recent full AM experience (ownership of renewals, upsells, and account health), which was last held at Logical Position.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [GrowthX's Account Strategist role requires full ownership of the client relationship, blending deep SEO/content expertise with strategic account management.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [GrowthX is evolving from a pure agency to a tech platform, creating new career paths (e.g., Director-level strategy consulting) for high-performing Account Strategists.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2149.0)

## Topics

### The GrowthX Account Strategist Role

  - [**Full Ownership:** The role requires one person to own the entire client relationship, including renewals, upsells, and account health.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Blended Expertise:** It combines deep SEO/content credibility with strategic account management.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2069.0)
  - [**Team Model:** Works with an assigned editor (using AI tools like Surfer SEO) and can escalate complex issues to a "pooled" team of Director-level growth leaders.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:** Measured by an evolving account health score with five dimensions:](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
    1.  [Relationship strength](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
    2.  [Contractual delivery](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
    3.  [Content quality](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
    4.  [Results (e.g., traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
    5.  [ROI (e.g., leads, revenue)](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)

### Dee Salvador's Experience & Fit

  - [**Current Role (Kuno Creative):** SEO Program Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Focus:** SEO strategy, execution, and reporting for \~15 accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Structure:** A Marketing Strategist serves as the primary AM; Dee is a product specialist.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Process:** Dee provides keyword research and content outlines; writers use Surfer SEO for drafts, which Dee then reviews for SEO quality.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)
  - [**Previous Experience (Logical Position):** Held a full AM role, owning renewals and managing 50-60 smaller accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1966.0)
  - [**Career Motivation:** Left Grow Together to work on higher-end accounts with more growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2110.0)

### GrowthX's Evolution & Challenges

  - [**Platform Strategy:** Building a tech platform to provide clients more control and create switching costs.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [**Past Churn Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
      - [**Bad Fit:** Clients lacking enthusiasm or trust in the process.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
      - [**Technical Complexity:** Clients with highly technical products requiring CTO-level review, creating bottlenecks.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
      - [**Organizational Complexity:** Slow internal approval processes delaying content publication and results.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
      - [**Strategic Misalignment:** Failing to connect SEO work to the client's broader business goals (e.g., leads vs. traffic).](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2690.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bridget McGillivray:** Discuss interview with Andy and Tucker.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2768.0)
  - [**Dee Salvador:** Await decision on a potential take-home exercise and presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/erbHcY_jBmEchqZsdcS5Q1zWx-mBWiyJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2768.0)
